_comment: Mortal Dust Region (凡尘域) — humble frontier of the Immortal Astral Continent where newly-ascended cultivators first arrive from the Cave World. Wind-swept, dusty, sparse vegetation. Spirit energy is dense (like the rest of the Continent) but the land is humble — its name refers to cultivators leaving behind 'mortal dust' to ascend. Stand-in spawns: husk=lost mortals who failed to ascend properly, spider/zombie=frontier hazards, donkey=pack animals of arriving cultivators. Desert village structures stand in for frontier outposts. Prime Directive: the dusty wind and humble landscape exist objectively; they are not illusions. New arrivals must build their foundation here before venturing inward.
